name: samxon
description: Samxon is a leading manufacturer of aluminum electrolytic capacitors, offering high-quality capacitive solutions for consumer electronics, industrial, and automotive applications.
longDescription: Samxon (Shenzhen Samxon Electronic Co., Ltd.) is a world-class manufacturer specializing in aluminum electrolytic capacitors. With decades of experience in capacitor technology, Samxon provides reliable capacitive solutions for power supplies, LED lighting, consumer electronics, and industrial applications. As an authorized distributor, LiTong Electronics offers comprehensive Samxon product selection, technical support, and supply chain services.

coreProducts.name: Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-performance aluminum electrolytic capacitors for power supply and lighting applications

coreProducts.name: Snap-in Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-capacitance snap-in capacitors for SMPS and LED drivers

coreProducts.name: SMD Aluminum Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Surface-mount aluminum electrolytic capacitors for compact designs

coreProducts.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Standard radial lead capacitors for general-purpose applications

keyFeatures: Low ESR and high CV product
distributorAdvantages: Authorized distributor with direct factory support
Technical support from certified FAE team
seoTitle: Samxon Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors | Authorized Distributor | LiTong Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Samxon aluminum electrolytic capacitors, snap-in capacitors, and SMD capacitors. Technical support, selection guide, and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: What types of capacitors does Samxon offer?
faqs.answer: Samxon offers a comprehensive range of aluminum electrolytic capacitors including radial lead capacitors, snap-in capacitors, SMD capacitors, and screw terminal capacitors. They also provide automotive-grade capacitors qualified to AEC-Q200 standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss your specific application requirements. We can help you select the optimal capacitor type based on capacitance, voltage, ripple current, and operating temperature requirements.

faqs.question: Are Samxon capacitors suitable for LED driver applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Samxon offers specialized capacitors for LED driver applications with high ripple current capability, long lifetime, and high temperature ratings. These capacitors are designed to meet the demanding requirements of LED lighting systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: For LED driver applications, specify capacitors with appropriate lifetime ratings and ripple current capability. Our FAE team can provide LED-specific capacitor recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of Samxon electrolytic capacitors?
faqs.answer: Samxon electrolytic capacitors offer excellent lifetime performance, typically rated for 2,000 to 15,000 hours at rated temperature. The actual lifetime depends on operating voltage, temperature, and ripple current. Using the lifetime calculation formula, you can estimate expected lifetime for your specific conditions.
faqs.decisionGuide: For lifetime-critical applications, provide your operating conditions and our FAE team can calculate expected lifetime using Samxon's reliability models.

faqs.question: Does Samxon offer custom capacitor designs?
faqs.answer: Yes, Samxon provides custom capacitor design services for specialized applications. Custom options include specific capacitance values, voltage ratings, physical dimensions, and special terminal configurations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For custom capacitor requirements, contact our FAE team with your specifications. We can coordinate with Samxon engineering to develop a custom solution.

faqs.question: What certifications do Samxon capacitors have?
faqs.answer: Samxon capacitors carry multiple international certifications including ISO 9001 for quality management, ISO 14001 for environmental management, IATF 16949 for automotive quality, and AEC-Q200 for automotive component qualification. All products are RoHS and REACH compliant.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring specific certifications, specify your requirements when requesting quotes. We can provide certificates of compliance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Samxon capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right capacitor requires considering several parameters: rated voltage (typically 1.2-1.5x operating voltage), capacitance value, ripple current rating, operating temperature range, physical size constraints, and application-specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application details for personalized capacitor selection assistance.
